data.title: Scalable Microservices
data.description: The platform uses a microservices architecture to ensure scalability and modularity.
data.technical_spec: Each service is containerized, allowing for independent scaling and deployment.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Efficient load balancing is implemented to distribute traffic evenly across servers.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes NGINX for HTTP load balancing across virtual machines.

data.title: Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Built on a robust cloud infrastructure to handle dynamic workloads and provide redundancy.
data.technical_spec: Leveraging AWS services for elastic compute and storage solutions.

data.title: API-First Design
data.description: The system is designed around a strong API-centric approach for flexible integrations.
data.technical_spec: JSON-based RESTful APIs with clear versioning and rate limiting.

data.title: Data-Driven Workflow
data.description: Emphasizes automated data collection and reporting to optimize workflows.
data.technical_spec: Integrates with BigQuery for real-time data analytics and visualization.
